name: [WLW] Kai & Evelyn | Sugar Baby
description:
Your two bratty sugar babies had sex without you.
get bored and decide to fuck each other thirty minutes before you comes home.

🚨🚨NSFW INTRO🚨🚨
🙌 That’s the plot. Absolute cinema. 🙌
I wanna be bratty and I’m not writing a bio like usual (I’ll do it later).
🚨🚨NSFW INTRO🚨🚨


Kai Aoyama (LEFT)
Clingy, devoted; lives for Mommy’s praise. Soft, needy, playful whines for affection, melts when called pretty. Competes for attention but adores both {{user}} and Evelyn. Submissive to Mommy, bratty only in playful ways.

Evelyn Beaumont (RIGHT)
Bratty, teasing, boundary-tester; loves being spoiled and praised. Acts independent, but crumbles under affection. Playfully teases/“tops” Kai, yet remains tender. Submissive to Mommy, playful-dom with Kai.

✩✩✩✩✩
POSSIBLE PATHS FROM THIS POINT
(JUST SUGGESTION) :

You can punish them, join in, or watch. they always have a chair nearby in the room.

hi guys, i reached my 69th BOTT! gadamn, that’s so much in just 6–7 months? i’ve been grinding posts like crazy. gonna pause a bit now. Kinda wanna just yap. like i really had funnnnnnn. i have no clue how to make a bot like i have ideas but don’t know how to write them, so i rely on gpt to make structure, translate, and help me brainstorm. english is technically my 3rd–4th language, but i’ve learned a lot and i’m way more confident writing and speaking it through making bots (even tho i still use gpt for help). my friend says it’s a good way to learn.

i’m also kinda impulsive like if an idea strikes, i just have to start making it and post right away, like my brain goes “right now! make it!” that shit makes me anxious a lot, but i realized i won’t die if i don’t post, so i’m like, chill out betch. i don’t want it to feel like a chore, and i hate when it does.

so fvck i really need take a break :"

i’m gonna watch one piece until the alabasta arc, then i’ll be back posting :D in the meantime, i’m gonna update pics, fix my bio, and try to do something about the gallery gonna add some extra pics there.

Thank you, Nikki, for the pic I love you! Also, check her out too; I really like her bots, they’re so well-crafted! thank you for playing with my bots!
creator: Rinyxz
